response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Major mismatch. The provided Reference JSON contains lyrics for 'ボウケンノショ ガ キエマシタ' (Bouken no Sho ga Kiemashita), but the video features a medley of 'Kanashimi o Yasashisa ni', 'GO!!!', 'Namikaze Satellite', 'memories', and an original song. 2. JSON Usage: Ignored the Reference JSON entirely due to the song mismatch; utilized 100% manual transcription and translation based on audio perception. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are tightly anchored to the vocal bursts. Applied instantaneous transitions in rapid sections and remained silent during the instrumental transition from 03:07 to 03:37.

subtitles.english: One more time

subtitles.original: 強引なほど 勝ち取き
subtitles.english: Seizing victory with brute force,

subtitles.original: 頭ごなしな 説教だけ
subtitles.english: and only preaching with an overbearing attitude.

subtitles.original: 自暴自棄に 羅列が 凝って
subtitles.english: A list of reckless acts piling up,

subtitles.original: 傷つけながら すぐに尖って
subtitles.english: getting sharp while hurting others.

subtitles.original: 新しい風 味方につけて
subtitles.english: Winning over the new wind,

subtitles.original: 探しているんだ いつか
subtitles.english: I'm searching for it someday...

subtitles.original: 青い鳥を
subtitles.english: the blue bird.

subtitles.original: そうだ 大事な物は いつも
subtitles.english: That's right, the important things are always

subtitles.original: 形のないものだけ
subtitles.english: only the things without form,

subtitles.original: 手に入れても なくしても 気付かぬまま
subtitles.english: whether I obtain them or lose them, I don't even notice.

subtitles.original: そうさ 悲しみを 優しさに
subtitles.english: That's it, turn sadness into kindness,

subtitles.original: 自分らしさを 力に
subtitles.english: turn your true self into strength,

subtitles.original: 迷いながらでもいい 歩き出して
subtitles.english: it's okay to lose your way, just start walking.

subtitles.original: 涙の跡は なぜか 吹き切ってた
subtitles.english: Somehow, the traces of tears were swept away,

subtitles.original: 空に虹が出るように 自然なこと
subtitles.english: as natural as a rainbow appearing in the sky.

subtitles.original: 雨はあがった だから
subtitles.english: The rain has stopped, so...

subtitles.original: そうだ 大事な物は いつも
subtitles.english: That's right, the important things are always

subtitles.original: 形のないものだけ
subtitles.english: only the things without form,

subtitles.original: 手に入れても なくしても 気付かぬまま
subtitles.english: whether I obtain them or lose them, I don't even notice.

subtitles.original: そうさ 悲しみを 優しさに
subtitles.english: That's it, turn sadness into kindness,

subtitles.original: 自分らしさを 力に
subtitles.english: turn your true self into strength,

subtitles.original: 君ならきっとやれる 信じていて
subtitles.english: you can surely do it, believe in yourself.

subtitles.original: 小さな頃には 宝の地図が
subtitles.english: When I was small, a treasure map

subtitles.original: 頭の中に浮かんでいて
subtitles.english: used to float in my head.

subtitles.original: いつでも探した 奇跡の場所
subtitles.english: I was always searching for that place of miracles,

subtitles.original: 知らない誰かに 負けないように
subtitles.english: so as not to lose to anyone I didn't know.

subtitles.original: ララララ... 今では
subtitles.english: La-la-la-la... And now,

subtitles.original: 誇りだらけの毎日
subtitles.english: every day is covered in dust.

subtitles.original: いつの日か 全ての
subtitles.english: Someday, I'll just surrender

subtitles.original: 時に身を任せるだけ
subtitles.english: everything to time.

subtitles.original: もしも世界が変わるのなら
subtitles.english: If the world were to change,

subtitles.original: 何も知らない頃の私に
subtitles.english: then for the me who knew nothing back then,

subtitles.original: 触れていて思い出が色褪せないように
subtitles.english: keep holding on so that the memories don't fade away.
